attestation_confidence_bands.authority_safety_posture: Unsigned or unverifiable evidence cannot be upgraded to auditor-grade confidence later.
attestation_confidence_bands.operator_visible_effect: Replay reviewers can judge attestation defensibility separately from business correctness.
attestation_confidence_bands.recovery_posture: Confidence band is immutable once the attestation is sealed.
attestation_confidence_bands.state_or_outcome: Attestation confidence score is at least 95.
attestation_confidence_bands.trigger_or_entry_condition: Attestation confidence score is computed from signature status, coverage, and undeclared variance mass.

attestation_confidence_bands.authority_safety_posture: Unsigned or unverifiable evidence cannot be upgraded to auditor-grade confidence later.
attestation_confidence_bands.operator_visible_effect: Replay reviewers can judge attestation defensibility separately from business correctness.
attestation_confidence_bands.recovery_posture: Confidence band is immutable once the attestation is sealed.
attestation_confidence_bands.trigger_or_entry_condition: Attestation confidence score is computed from signature status, coverage, and undeclared variance mass.

attestation_confidence_bands.recovery_posture: Confidence band is immutable once the attestation is sealed.
attestation_confidence_bands.trigger_or_entry_condition: Attestation confidence score is computed from signature status, coverage, and undeclared variance mass.

attestation_confidence_bands.operator_visible_effect: Replay reviewers can judge attestation defensibility separately from business correctness.
attestation_confidence_bands.recovery_posture: Confidence band is immutable once the attestation is sealed.
attestation_confidence_bands.trigger_or_entry_condition: Attestation confidence score is computed from signature status, coverage, and undeclared variance mass.

attestation_confidence_bands.authority_safety_posture: Unsigned or unverifiable evidence cannot be upgraded to auditor-grade confidence later.
attestation_confidence_bands.operator_visible_effect: Replay reviewers can judge attestation defensibility separately from business correctness.
attestation_confidence_bands.recovery_posture: Confidence band is immutable once the attestation is sealed.
attestation_confidence_bands.state_or_outcome: Attestation confidence score is below 30 or basis is corrupt.
attestation_confidence_bands.trigger_or_entry_condition: Attestation confidence score is computed from signature status, coverage, and undeclared variance mass.

attestation_requirements.authority_safety_posture: No replay-visible truth may publish before the attestation is durable and linked.
attestation_requirements.operator_visible_effect: Operators and auditors can consume the same durable comparison record at different explanation depths.
attestation_requirements.recovery_posture: Attestation is immutable after persistence; corrections require new lineage or superseding artifacts.
attestation_requirements.state_or_outcome: ReplayAttestation must capture the full comparison envelope and explanation basis.
attestation_requirements.trigger_or_entry_condition: A replay child reaches a persisted decision outcome.

attestation_requirements.authority_safety_posture: Counterfactual analysis must stay analysis-only and exact/audit replay must stay compliance grade.
notes: EXPECTED_EQUIVALENCE and EXPECTED_DIFFERENCE require non-empty difference reason codes.
LIMITED_COMPARABLE and BASIS_INCOMPLETE require non-empty limitation codes.
attestation_requirements.operator_visible_effect: Incoherent replay context becomes a validator failure rather than user-visible ambiguity.
attestation_requirements.recovery_posture: Replay class coherence remains part of the durable artifact contract, not just runtime validation.
attestation_requirements.state_or_outcome: Execution context fields must align coherently with the replay class and outcome class.
attestation_requirements.trigger_or_entry_condition: ReplayAttestation is serialized for STANDARD_REPLAY, AUDIT_REPLAY, or COUNTERFACTUAL_ANALYSIS.

basis_identity_verdicts.authority_safety_posture: Undeclared basis variance remains explicit even when outcome differences are non-material.
basis_identity_verdicts.operator_visible_effect: Replay inspectors can separate identical basis from limited or corrupt basis posture.
basis_identity_verdicts.recovery_posture: Basis verdict remains linked to persisted dimension results and cannot be recomputed from dashboards.
basis_identity_verdicts.state_or_outcome: Observed dimensions/components match exactly under the declared comparison basis.
basis_identity_verdicts.trigger_or_entry_condition: Observed basis-dimension results are classified after weighting and coverage computation.

basis_identity_verdicts.authority_safety_posture: Undeclared basis variance remains explicit even when outcome differences are non-material.
basis_identity_verdicts.operator_visible_effect: Replay inspectors can separate identical basis from limited or corrupt basis posture.
basis_identity_verdicts.recovery_posture: Basis verdict remains linked to persisted dimension results and cannot be recomputed from dashboards.
basis_identity_verdicts.trigger_or_entry_condition: Observed basis-dimension results are classified after weighting and coverage computation.

basis_identity_verdicts.operator_visible_effect: Replay inspectors can separate identical basis from limited or corrupt basis posture.
basis_identity_verdicts.recovery_posture: Basis verdict remains linked to persisted dimension results and cannot be recomputed from dashboards.
basis_identity_verdicts.state_or_outcome: Coverage is insufficient to resolve an exact verdict.
basis_identity_verdicts.trigger_or_entry_condition: Observed basis-dimension results are classified after weighting and coverage computation.

basis_identity_verdicts.authority_safety_posture: Undeclared basis variance remains explicit even when outcome differences are non-material.
basis_identity_verdicts.operator_visible_effect: Replay inspectors can separate identical basis from limited or corrupt basis posture.
basis_identity_verdicts.recovery_posture: Basis verdict remains linked to persisted dimension results and cannot be recomputed from dashboards.
basis_identity_verdicts.state_or_outcome: At least one observed dimension/component failed integrity checks.
basis_identity_verdicts.trigger_or_entry_condition: Observed basis-dimension results are classified after weighting and coverage computation.

basis_validation_states.authority_safety_posture: Missing, corrupt, or schema-incompatible basis may not be replaced from live truth.
basis_validation_states.operator_visible_effect: Investigators can see whether a replay was valid, limited, missing, corrupt, or blocked by build availability.
basis_validation_states.recovery_posture: Basis validation state defines whether replay may proceed, downgrade, or fail closed.
basis_validation_states.state_or_outcome: Full basis is available and reader-compatible.
basis_validation_states.trigger_or_entry_condition: Replay comparison checks whether retained basis is usable and defensible.

basis_validation_states.authority_safety_posture: Missing, corrupt, or schema-incompatible basis may not be replaced from live truth.
basis_validation_states.operator_visible_effect: Investigators can see whether a replay was valid, limited, missing, corrupt, or blocked by build availability.
basis_validation_states.recovery_posture: Basis validation state defines whether replay may proceed, downgrade, or fail closed.
basis_validation_states.state_or_outcome: Basis exists only in minimized or limitation-preserving form.
basis_validation_states.trigger_or_entry_condition: Replay comparison checks whether retained basis is usable and defensible.

basis_validation_states.authority_safety_posture: Missing, corrupt, or schema-incompatible basis may not be replaced from live truth.
basis_validation_states.operator_visible_effect: Investigators can see whether a replay was valid, limited, missing, corrupt, or blocked by build availability.
basis_validation_states.recovery_posture: Basis validation state defines whether replay may proceed, downgrade, or fail closed.
basis_validation_states.state_or_outcome: A required retained basis component cannot be found.
basis_validation_states.trigger_or_entry_condition: Replay comparison checks whether retained basis is usable and defensible.

basis_validation_states.authority_safety_posture: Missing, corrupt, or schema-incompatible basis may not be replaced from live truth.
basis_validation_states.operator_visible_effect: Investigators can see whether a replay was valid, limited, missing, corrupt, or blocked by build availability.
basis_validation_states.recovery_posture: Basis validation state defines whether replay may proceed, downgrade, or fail closed.
basis_validation_states.state_or_outcome: A retained artifact or hash failed integrity validation.
basis_validation_states.trigger_or_entry_condition: Replay comparison checks whether retained basis is usable and defensible.

basis_validation_states.recovery_posture: Basis validation state defines whether replay may proceed, downgrade, or fail closed.
basis_validation_states.state_or_outcome: Recorded schema bundle cannot be deserialized by the available runtime.

basis_validation_states.recovery_posture: Basis validation state defines whether replay may proceed, downgrade, or fail closed.
basis_validation_states.state_or_outcome: Historical build or reader bundle is unavailable for exact comparison.
basis_validation_states.trigger_or_entry_condition: Replay comparison checks whether retained basis is usable and defensible.

comparison_modes.authority_safety_posture: Comparison mode cannot be upgraded later by re-reading live state.
comparison_modes.operator_visible_effect: Replay dashboards expose the comparison mode directly instead of collapsing it into one pass/fail badge.
comparison_modes.recovery_posture: Comparison mode remains immutable once the attestation is persisted.
comparison_modes.state_or_outcome: Basis and deterministic outcome hashes match under exact replay claimable posture.
comparison_modes.trigger_or_entry_condition: Replay comparison classifies one persisted replay child.

comparison_modes.authority_safety_posture: Comparison mode cannot be upgraded later by re-reading live state.
comparison_modes.operator_visible_effect: Replay dashboards expose the comparison mode directly instead of collapsing it into one pass/fail badge.
comparison_modes.recovery_posture: Comparison mode remains immutable once the attestation is persisted.
comparison_modes.state_or_outcome: Declared counterfactual variance is present and comparison remains explained by the declared basis.
comparison_modes.trigger_or_entry_condition: Replay comparison classifies one persisted replay child.

comparison_modes.authority_safety_posture: Comparison mode cannot be upgraded later by re-reading live state.
comparison_modes.operator_visible_effect: Replay dashboards expose the comparison mode directly instead of collapsing it into one pass/fail badge.
comparison_modes.recovery_posture: Comparison mode remains immutable once the attestation is persisted.
comparison_modes.state_or_outcome: Some basis or material outcome components are observable, but coverage is incomplete.
comparison_modes.trigger_or_entry_condition: Replay comparison classifies one persisted replay child.

comparison_modes.authority_safety_posture: Comparison mode cannot be upgraded later by re-reading live state.
comparison_modes.operator_visible_effect: Replay dashboards expose the comparison mode directly instead of collapsing it into one pass/fail badge.
comparison_modes.recovery_posture: Comparison mode remains immutable once the attestation is persisted.
comparison_modes.state_or_outcome: Retained basis is too incomplete to support even limited material comparison.
comparison_modes.trigger_or_entry_condition: Replay comparison classifies one persisted replay child.

comparison_modes.authority_safety_posture: Comparison mode cannot be upgraded later by re-reading live state.
comparison_modes.operator_visible_effect: Replay dashboards expose the comparison mode directly instead of collapsing it into one pass/fail badge.
comparison_modes.recovery_posture: Comparison mode remains immutable once the attestation is persisted.
comparison_modes.state_or_outcome: Integrity validation failed or verdicts are corrupt.
comparison_modes.trigger_or_entry_condition: Replay comparison classifies one persisted replay child.

corruption_and_limitation_rules.authority_safety_posture: Live state may not be used to fill missing historical basis.
corruption_and_limitation_rules.operator_visible_effect: Investigators see missing dependency rather than synthetic substitute history.
corruption_and_limitation_rules.state_or_outcome: Emit a typed missing-basis error or persist a limited replay attestation according to policy.
corruption_and_limitation_rules.trigger_or_entry_condition: A required frozen artifact cannot be found during replay.

corruption_and_limitation_rules.authority_safety_posture: Integrity failure blocks reuse or resend decisions that depend on historical truth.
corruption_and_limitation_rules.operator_visible_effect: Operators see corrupt basis as a first-class replay posture.
corruption_and_limitation_rules.recovery_posture: Corrupt basis remains explicit rather than silently repaired.
corruption_and_limitation_rules.trigger_or_entry_condition: A retained artifact fails integrity validation or hash comparison.

corruption_and_limitation_rules.authority_safety_posture: Historical truth may not be silently deserialized through a newer shape with changed semantics.
corruption_and_limitation_rules.operator_visible_effect: Release and replay teams can see when a reader window blocked historical access.
corruption_and_limitation_rules.recovery_posture: Reader compatibility is taken from the persisted historical bundle boundary, not the currently live deploy.
corruption_and_limitation_rules.state_or_outcome: Replay remains in SCHEMA_INCOMPATIBLE posture until a compatible reader is supplied.
corruption_and_limitation_rules.trigger_or_entry_condition: The runtime cannot deserialize a historical artifact under the recorded schema bundle.

corruption_and_limitation_rules.authority_safety_posture: Retention cannot erase the fact that historical basis was minimized.
corruption_and_limitation_rules.operator_visible_effect: Auditors can tell that exact basis was not preserved even though hashes survived.
corruption_and_limitation_rules.recovery_posture: Limited historical comparison remains explicit rather than silently downgraded in UI copy alone.
corruption_and_limitation_rules.state_or_outcome: Replay may proceed only as LIMITED_HISTORICAL_COMPARISON and must state the limitation.
corruption_and_limitation_rules.trigger_or_entry_condition: Privacy minimization preserved hashes or placeholders but not full payload content.

deterministic_equivalence_verdicts.authority_safety_posture: Material outcome equivalence cannot be inferred from a root hash alone without component evidence.
deterministic_equivalence_verdicts.operator_visible_effect: Operators can see whether outcomes were identical, different, undecidable, or corrupt.
deterministic_equivalence_verdicts.recovery_posture: Outcome verdict remains durable and replayable from persisted component results.
deterministic_equivalence_verdicts.state_or_outcome: Observed dimensions/components match exactly under the declared comparison basis.
deterministic_equivalence_verdicts.trigger_or_entry_condition: Observed outcome-component results are classified after material coverage and match calculations.

deterministic_equivalence_verdicts.trigger_or_entry_condition: Observed outcome-component results are classified after material coverage and match calculations.

outcome_classes.authority_safety_posture: Expected outcomes require declared basis variance; undeclared variance becomes UNEXPECTED_MISMATCH.
outcome_classes.operator_visible_effect: Replay result consumers can tell exact match from limited, corrupt, or unexpected mismatch states.
outcome_classes.recovery_posture: Outcome class remains coupled to the immutable attestation artifact.
outcome_classes.state_or_outcome: Exact replay claim is fully supportable.
outcome_classes.trigger_or_entry_condition: Classification rules finish evaluating basis state, verdicts, coverage, and declared variance.

outcome_classes.authority_safety_posture: Expected outcomes require declared basis variance; undeclared variance becomes UNEXPECTED_MISMATCH.

outcome_classes.recovery_posture: Outcome class remains coupled to the immutable attestation artifact.

rows.recovery_posture: Outcome class remains coupled to the immutable attestation artifact.
rows.state_or_outcome: Exact replay claim is fully supportable.
rows.trigger_or_entry_condition: Classification rules finish evaluating basis state, verdicts, coverage, and declared variance.

rows.authority_safety_posture: Unsigned or unverifiable evidence cannot be upgraded to auditor-grade confidence later.
rows.operator_visible_effect: Replay reviewers can judge attestation defensibility separately from business correctness.
rows.recovery_posture: Confidence band is immutable once the attestation is sealed.
rows.state_or_outcome: Attestation confidence score is at least 95.
rows.trigger_or_entry_condition: Attestation confidence score is computed from signature status, coverage, and undeclared variance mass.

rows.authority_safety_posture: Unsigned or unverifiable evidence cannot be upgraded to auditor-grade confidence later.
rows.operator_visible_effect: Replay reviewers can judge attestation defensibility separately from business correctness.
rows.recovery_posture: Confidence band is immutable once the attestation is sealed.
rows.state_or_outcome: Attestation confidence score is in [80, 94].
rows.trigger_or_entry_condition: Attestation confidence score is computed from signature status, coverage, and undeclared variance mass.

rows.authority_safety_posture: Unsigned or unverifiable evidence cannot be upgraded to auditor-grade confidence later.
rows.operator_visible_effect: Replay reviewers can judge attestation defensibility separately from business correctness.
rows.recovery_posture: Confidence band is immutable once the attestation is sealed.
rows.state_or_outcome: Attestation confidence score is in [60, 79].
rows.trigger_or_entry_condition: Attestation confidence score is computed from signature status, coverage, and undeclared variance mass.

rows.authority_safety_posture: Unsigned or unverifiable evidence cannot be upgraded to auditor-grade confidence later.
rows.operator_visible_effect: Replay reviewers can judge attestation defensibility separately from business correctness.
rows.recovery_posture: Confidence band is immutable once the attestation is sealed.
rows.state_or_outcome: Attestation confidence score is in [30, 59].
rows.trigger_or_entry_condition: Attestation confidence score is computed from signature status, coverage, and undeclared variance mass.

rows.authority_safety_posture: Unsigned or unverifiable evidence cannot be upgraded to auditor-grade confidence later.
rows.operator_visible_effect: Replay reviewers can judge attestation defensibility separately from business correctness.
rows.recovery_posture: Confidence band is immutable once the attestation is sealed.
rows.state_or_outcome: Attestation confidence score is below 30 or basis is corrupt.
rows.trigger_or_entry_condition: Attestation confidence score is computed from signature status, coverage, and undeclared variance mass.

rows.authority_safety_posture: Live state may not be used to fill missing historical basis.
rows.operator_visible_effect: Investigators see missing dependency rather than synthetic substitute history.
rows.recovery_posture: Fresh replacement sourcing is forbidden.
rows.state_or_outcome: Emit a typed missing-basis error or persist a limited replay attestation according to policy.
rows.trigger_or_entry_condition: A required frozen artifact cannot be found during replay.

rows.authority_safety_posture: Integrity failure blocks reuse or resend decisions that depend on historical truth.
rows.operator_visible_effect: Operators see corrupt basis as a first-class replay posture.
rows.recovery_posture: Corrupt basis remains explicit rather than silently repaired.
rows.state_or_outcome: Replay enters BASIS_CORRUPT posture.
rows.trigger_or_entry_condition: A retained artifact fails integrity validation or hash comparison.

rows.authority_safety_posture: Historical truth may not be silently deserialized through a newer shape with changed semantics.
rows.operator_visible_effect: Release and replay teams can see when a reader window blocked historical access.
rows.recovery_posture: Reader compatibility is taken from the persisted historical bundle boundary, not the currently live deploy.
rows.state_or_outcome: Replay remains in SCHEMA_INCOMPATIBLE posture until a compatible reader is supplied.
rows.trigger_or_entry_condition: The runtime cannot deserialize a historical artifact under the recorded schema bundle.

rows.authority_safety_posture: Retention cannot erase the fact that historical basis was minimized.
rows.operator_visible_effect: Auditors can tell that exact basis was not preserved even though hashes survived.
rows.recovery_posture: Limited historical comparison remains explicit rather than silently downgraded in UI copy alone.
rows.state_or_outcome: Replay may proceed only as LIMITED_HISTORICAL_COMPARISON and must state the limitation.
rows.trigger_or_entry_condition: Privacy minimization preserved hashes or placeholders but not full payload content.

rows.authority_safety_posture: No replay-visible truth may publish before the attestation is durable and linked.
rows.operator_visible_effect: Operators and auditors can consume the same durable comparison record at different explanation depths.
rows.recovery_posture: Attestation is immutable after persistence; corrections require new lineage or superseding artifacts.
rows.state_or_outcome: ReplayAttestation must capture the full comparison envelope and explanation basis.
rows.trigger_or_entry_condition: A replay child reaches a persisted decision outcome.

rows.authority_safety_posture: Counterfactual analysis must stay analysis-only and exact/audit replay must stay compliance grade.
notes: EXPECTED_EQUIVALENCE and EXPECTED_DIFFERENCE require non-empty difference reason codes.
LIMITED_COMPARABLE and BASIS_INCOMPLETE require non-empty limitation codes.
rows.operator_visible_effect: Incoherent replay context becomes a validator failure rather than user-visible ambiguity.
rows.recovery_posture: Replay class coherence remains part of the durable artifact contract, not just runtime validation.
rows.state_or_outcome: Execution context fields must align coherently with the replay class and outcome class.
rows.trigger_or_entry_condition: ReplayAttestation is serialized for STANDARD_REPLAY, AUDIT_REPLAY, or COUNTERFACTUAL_ANALYSIS.

variance_taxonomy.authority_safety_posture: Declared counterfactual variance differs from undeclared basis drift or integrity failure.
variance_taxonomy.operator_visible_effect: Difference explainers can name whether divergence was declared, material, blocking, limited, or corrupt.
variance_taxonomy.recovery_posture: Variance remains explicit at the per-dimension and per-component level.
variance_taxonomy.trigger_or_entry_condition: A basis-dimension result or outcome-component result records comparison variance.
